The question is asking to determine the venue where the Vikings played after their game at Mile High Stadium. Since the "date" column contains date information, we can sort the data using the f_sort_column(date) operation with the order "small to large" to arrange the games in chronological order. This will allow us to see the sequence of venues and identify the venue that followed Mile High Stadium.

The Vikings played at Mile High Stadium on October 15 (row 5). The next game after that was on October 23 at Soldier Field (row 6). Therefore, the venue they played in after Mile High Stadium was Soldier Field.
